mnemonics.title: Dependent Vectors
mnemonics.content: Dependent vectors are like friends who always copy each other - if one does something, others follow in a predictable way.

mnemonics.title: Independent Vectors
mnemonics.content: Independent vectors are like unique ingredients - each brings something new to the recipe that can't be made from the others.

mnemonics.title: Span Concept
mnemonics.content: SPAN = Set of Possible Arrangements from the vectors - all combinations you can make from them.
